name: Japan Gold Corp.
description: Japan Gold Corp. is a Canadian publicly traded mineral exploration company focused on the discovery of high-grade epithermal gold deposits in Japan. The company holds an extensive, district-scale portfolio of prospecting rights across Japan's three largest islands—Hokkaido, Honshu, and Kyushu—covering areas with historical mining activity and known gold occurrences. Leveraging a comprehensive technical database and modern exploration methods, Japan Gold targets underexplored terrain near historic mines, supported by a mining-friendly regulatory environment and a leadership team with deep experience in the Japanese resource sector.
